prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial begins with a close, low-angle view of a table covered with prepared food. Several taco- or burrito-like items, bowls, and toppings are visible in the foreground, with blurred people standing or sitting in the background. A prominent on-screen graphic appears near the center: the Taco Bell logo with the text “WAKE UP” and “LIVE MÁS.” Small fine print appears along the bottom but is too small to read clearly.

The image then cuts briefly to black.

Next, the commercial shows a close-up of a dark wooden surface, possibly a box, plaque, or book cover. It bears an ornate emblem with wings and mechanical/technical-looking linework, along with the words “INNOVATORS CLUB.” Below the emblem, the text “FIVE YEARS OUT” is visible. In the lower-left corner, white text identifies a person: “Serena S,” “Industrial Designer,” and “Member Since 2009.”

The scene then changes to a warmly lit interior gathering with a formal, old-fashioned or period-style atmosphere. Several adults are dressed in suits, waistcoats, dresses, and formal attire. A woman with dark hair stands near the center, facing a man in a suit, while other people stand around them. A table lamp glows in the middle foreground, and seated figures are partially visible at the bottom of the frame. The setting appears like a private club, parlor, or formal social room, but the exact location is not specified by the frames.

The commercial then cuts to a black screen with centered white text reading: “Are You Five Years Out?” This same black title card remains through the final sampled frame.
